should_trigger: is my Boston lot eligible for an ADU

does the parking exemption apply if I'm near a T stop
can the city require owner-occupancy after Ch 150
what does 760 CMR 71.00 say about parking
run the PermitMonkey eligibility check on 123 Main St, Somerville, MA
should_not_trigger: interpret this corrections letter from Boston ISD

rationale: Companion skill activates when the user is asking about MA ADU eligibility decisions and the agent has access to the permitmonkey-ma-eligibility MCP tool. Must NOT activate on corrections-letter work (different paid product), construction-code questions (different scope), or non-MA jurisdictions.
